headline: Senate Agrees To Narrow DHS Shutdown, Fund TSA; Airline Stocks Keep Sliding
summary: The Senate agreed to fund part of the Department of Homeland Security, including the Transportation Safety Administration. The deal should help eliminate the long wait times at airports caused by the shutdown.
